complaint: I have had recurring fever with chills and extreme fatigue for the past 3 days. It comes and goes.

simulated_answers.fever: I've been having fever for 3 days. It comes and goes — usually worse in the evenings.
simulated_answers.cyclic fever: Yes, the fever is cyclical. I get burning hot, then after a few hours it breaks and I sweat a lot.
simulated_answers.intermittent fever: Yes, the fever is not constant. It comes in waves every few hours.
simulated_answers.how long: About 3 days now. It started suddenly.
simulated_answers.duration: 3 days. It started after I came back from the field.
simulated_answers.chills: Yes, I get severe chills and uncontrollable shivering before the fever comes.
simulated_answers.shivering: Yes, I shiver badly. My whole body shakes before the fever rises.
simulated_answers.rigor: Yes, I get shaking chills — it lasts about 30 minutes then I go very hot.
simulated_answers.fatigue: I feel extremely weak and tired. I cannot even stand for long.
simulated_answers.weakness: My whole body is weak. I could not go to the field today.
simulated_answers.body ache: Yes, I have pain in all my muscles and joints. Even my eyes hurt.
simulated_answers.headache: Yes, there is a throbbing headache especially when the fever is high.
simulated_answers.sweating: After the fever breaks, I sweat a lot — my clothes get completely wet.
simulated_answers.mosquito: Yes, I work in the paddy fields. There are a lot of mosquitoes especially in the evening.
simulated_answers.insect: Yes, mosquitoes bite me every day in the fields. I don't use any protection.
simulated_answers.water: There is a lot of stagnant water near the fields after the rains. Mosquitoes breed there.
simulated_answers.exposure: Yes, I have been working near stagnant water for weeks.
simulated_answers.travel: No recent travel outside Jharkhand. I have been here only.
simulated_answers.vomiting: No vomiting, but I feel nauseous sometimes.
simulated_answers.medication: I took paracetamol twice. It brought the fever down for a few hours but it came back.
simulated_answers.treatment: Only paracetamol from the local shop. Nothing else.
simulated_answers.eating: I have lost my appetite. I have barely eaten in 2 days.
simulated_answers.urine: My urine looks slightly dark. Not normal colour.
simulated_answers.family: No one else in my family is sick right now.
simulated_answers.symptom: Main symptoms are fever with chills, body ache, headache, and extreme weakness.

tests.blood smear: P. vivax gametocytes and trophozoites seen — moderate parasitemia
tests.cbc: Hb: 10.2 g/dL (mild anemia), Platelets: 98,000 (low), WBC: Normal
tests.complete blood count: Hb: 10.2 g/dL (mild anemia), Platelets: 98,000 (low), WBC: Normal
